title: Babytown Baby Boys & Girls Animal Snuggle Comforter Blanket Pink Elephant, One Size
features: BED-TIME BUDDIES - An essential item for your baby, designed to comfort them, these buddies are perfect for cuddles and sure to become your baby's favourite!
EVERYDAY USE - These comforters aren't limited to bedtime, they also make great travel companions. Ideal for keeping on the car seat for long journeys!
SOFT PLUSHIES - Made from 100% Polyester. The super soft material is great for cuddling up to during naps with out irritating your baby's delicate skin!
FOUR CHARACTERS - Choose from a range of 4 super cute characters including, teddy bears, unicorns, a lamb and elephants or mix and match them with our multibuy option!
A PERFECT PRESENT- An ideal gift for any new parents, perfect for giving as a gift in nappy cakes, baby showers, birthdays or christenings!
